# go-zenon

> Reference Go implementation of Zenon Network of Momentum (NoM), Alphanet Phase 0. Dual-ledger blockchain — per-account chains anchored by a global momentum chain produced by elected pillars. Anti-spam via plasma (fused QSR or PoW). Protocol upgrades via sporks.

Module path: `github.com/zenon-network/go-zenon`. Go 1.20+.

## Primary documentation

- [README](README.md): Build and run instructions.
- [ARCHITECTURE.md](ARCHITECTURE.md): System overview, dual-ledger model, concept glossary (momentum, account block, plasma, spork, pillar).
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): Per-package one-liner map and where-to-look index.
- [docs/api/README.md](docs/api/README.md): Index of all rendered godocs.
- [docs/STYLE.md](docs/STYLE.md): Godoc style guide.

## Canonical API reference

Once merged to master, the canonical agent-facing API surface is pkg.go.dev:
https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/zenon-network/go-zenon

For GitHub-side review without a pkg.go.dev round-trip, use [docs/api/](docs/api/README.md).

## Where to start by topic

- **Block model and ledger types**: [chain/nom](docs/api/chain/nom/README.md) — `AccountBlock`, `Momentum`, transaction wrappers.
- **Embedded contracts (Pillar, Sentinel, Stake, Token, Plasma, Spork, Swap, Accelerator, HTLC, Bridge, Liquidity)**: [vm/embedded](docs/api/vm/embedded/README.md) — dispatcher; [vm/embedded/definition](docs/api/vm/embedded/definition/README.md) — ABI; [vm/embedded/implementation](docs/api/vm/embedded/implementation/README.md) — behavior.
- **Consensus (pillar election, points, ticks)**: [consensus](docs/api/consensus/README.md).
- **Block production**: [pillar](docs/api/pillar/README.md).
- **Validation**: [verifier](docs/api/verifier/README.md).
- **Sync and P2P**: [protocol](docs/api/protocol/README.md), [p2p](docs/api/p2p/README.md).
- **RPC API**: [rpc/api](docs/api/rpc/api/README.md), [rpc/api/embedded](docs/api/rpc/api/embedded/README.md).
- **Top-level orchestration**: [zenon](docs/api/zenon/README.md).

## Optional: chat/MCP access

This repo is indexed by DeepWiki at https://deepwiki.com/zenon-network/go-zenon (chat UI). MCP-compatible agents can use the DeepWiki MCP server at https://mcp.deepwiki.com/mcp to query the repo programmatically.
